commands.review_summary:
The PR adds a delimiter check to the shared set/unset slash parser and regression tests for `/config-check` and `/config: show`.

Reproducibility: yes. for source-level reproduction, not for a live channel run. Current main uses prefix `startsWith` checks in the shared parser and direct handlers, and the PR body shows after-fix terminal output for the shared parser path.
commands.review_followup: Queue a focused repair because the remaining blocker is mechanical: reuse the boundary logic in direct built-in slash handlers and add regressions before merge.

target.title: fix(auto-reply): require slash command boundary
